versions.releaseNotes: v1.72.20: Mac init script + Linux/Mac builds + cloud-landing i18n + ParticleBackground fix
v1.72.18: APP消息云中继双向同步 — 移动端可通过云服务器发送消息到桌面AI，支持cloud_account模式实时双向通信
v1.72.17: 全平台重新打包 — cloud-server域名优化 + macOS双架构 + Linux DEB
v1.72.16: Fix download progress bar disappearing (remove redundant checkForUpdates in download handler)
v1.72.15: Fix online update DNS — lingjing.zhejiangjinmo.com → ide.zhejiangjinmo.com
v1.72.14: Remove dangling imports - patch-tenant-quota.ts and routers/__init__.py cleanup
v1.72.13: Remove homepage dashboard, tenant login, business dashboard (-3763 lines). Cloud-only code cleanup.
v1.72.12: Fix admin blank page (router base URL) + crypto.randomBytes crash (missing node:crypto import)

v1.72.11: CRITICAL - remove dormant disable-gpu fallback from window-utils.ts that re-triggered no-window bug after 3 consecutive failures, version-aware rollback (only count same-version failures), NaN guard in window bounds validation, GPU diagnostic logging on window creation
v1.72.10: CRITICAL - remove --disable-gpu (fixes no-window bug on Windows/Linux), fix Linux --disable-software-rasterizer

v1.72.9: 35 security fixes (L0-L3) - 4 new security modules (crypto-utils, rate-limiter, audit-logger, db-helpers), timing attack safeCompare, scrypt password hashing, CSP tighten, rate limiting, JWT_SECRET enforce, 14 perf indexes
v1.72.8: CRITICAL FIX - remove disable-software-rasterizer (no window bug)
v1.72.7: boot diagnostic log + GPU sw render + error dialog + show:true
v1.72.6: boot.log diagnostic + GPU software rendering
v1.72.5: GPU software rendering + uncaughtException error dialog + bootstrap catch
v1.72.4: createWindow try/catch with fallback error window + full renderer crash recovery
v1.72.3: renderer crash auto-recovery + loadFile error page + render-process-gone handler
v1.72.2: Fix online update (asarUnpack + node_modules in build + blockmap) + show:true
v1.72.1: CRITICAL - show:true (window always visible, eliminates never-appear bug)
v1.72.0: Triple layer startup protection - lazy node-pty + try/catch IPC + force-show fallback
v1.71.8: Fix node-pty crash on Windows (lazy import) + ASCII artifactName
v1.71.7: Fix update download (ASCII artifactName) + 14 audit fixes + PTY + Debug MVP + init-script
v1.71.6: BUG-020 headless mode + PTY terminal + Debug MVP + init-script + 14 audit fixes
v1.71.5: PTY terminal (node-pty) + Debug MVP + init-script Quest + 13 audit fixes
v1.71.3: Debug MVP (launch.json + Node.js inspect + DebugPanel)
v1.71.3: GAP-001 Debug MVP (launch.json + Node.js inspect + DebugPanel UI) + 11项审计缺陷修复
v1.71.2: Phase 3-5审计修复合集 (11项缺陷: 终端孤儿进程/闭包陷阱/并发限制/执行追踪/Docker资源限制/Token加密/Worktree冲突/Browser恢复/消息上限/beforeunload/lint)
v1.71.2: Phase 3-5审计修复合集 (11项缺陷: 终端孤儿进程/闭包陷阱/并发限制/执行追踪/Docker资源限制/Token加密/Worktree冲突/Browser恢复/消息上限/beforeunload/lint)
v1.71.1: 4项遗留审计缺陷修复 (BUG-007/008/014 + DB-002) + 版本号统一升级
域名统一(lingjing→ide) + Cloud Landing生产上线 + 前端首页重构
审计收尾：Checkpoint密钥持久化 + Token时序安全修复 + InlineChat竞态修复 (3项高危缺陷)
修复 Agent/Session IPC 重复注册 + session:list handler 补全
FC31租户配额管理 + 看板CRUD补全 (quality/attendance/consumables PUT+DELETE)
v1.69.1: FC06 tools/builtin源文件补全 + FC10 skills源文件补全 + FC18迁移命名标准化
v1.68.0: OpenSpace融合层命名空间修复(openspace-register)
v1.67.0: Webhook配置管理界面 + 版本更新弹窗24h抑制
v1.66.0: 技能评分系统 + Migration008(skill_reviews/usage_stats/push_log) + db:health IPC增强
v1.65.1: Quest任务创建修复(数据库诊断增强) - db:health IPC + quest_tasks预检查 + 分类错误消息
v1.65.0: IDE增强(6模块)+硬件设计技能(3技能包) - 会话AES-256加密持久化+移动端远程控制+技能市场+推送通知+KiCad/OpenSCAD/Wokwi
v1.64.51: Quest任务创建失败Bug修复 - 数据库初始化失败保护 + saveLock恢复 + 错误诊断增强
Docker构建修复+Win交叉编译支持: 修复docker-build.sh/docker-compose.yml拼写错误, 新增Dockerfile.win(Wine交叉编译)
